name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
description: This robe has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

dazzling_display.effect: Display shifting pattern of dazzling hues

light_and_disadvantage.effect: Creatures that can see you have Disadvantage on attack rolls

stun_effect.trigger: Creature in Bright Light that can see you when activated
